## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed?

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] Feature change (small/isolated)

## Validation

List the commands you ran and their outcomes.

```bash
# example
cargo check
cargo test -p paradoxpe
```

## Risks / Compatibility

- Any behavior changes?
- Any migration notes?
- Any runtime/perf tradeoffs?

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused to one logical topic.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I added clear reproduction/verification notes.
